title: chrysopsis villosa var. angustifolia
intro: Chrysopsis villosa var. angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Goldenray, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Chrysopsis villosa var. angustifolia include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
